meta.title: Team Member Editor
meta.description: Editor interface for Team Member posts

toAdd.name: photo
toAdd.description: Attachment ID for the team member photo. Used in card-team-member.php template. Currently used in the template but NOT registered as meta — must be added to theme_register_team_member_meta().

autoTitleSync.note: Sync post title to full name (first_name + ' ' + last_name) whenever either field changes. This mirrors the card template which constructs full name from these two fields.

excerptUsage.label: Role / Job Title
excerptUsage.note: The card template uses get_the_excerpt() as the role. The sidebar panel should include a TextControl for the excerpt. Use editPost({ excerpt: value }) to update it — NOT meta.

requiredPatterns.usage: if (postType !== 'team_member') return null — in both block component and sidebar panel
useSelect for meta reading, editPost({ meta: {...} }) for writing
useEffect to sync post title to first_name + ' ' + last_name
useSelect with coreStore to fetch department terms for read-only display
All fields in both block body (visual preview) and PluginDocumentSettingPanel
Read excerpt via getEditedPostAttribute('excerpt'), write via editPost({ excerpt: value })

componentStructure.blockBody: div with blockProps containing article that mirrors card-team-member.php

qualityChecklist: block.json has inserter: false, multiple: false, attributes: {}
No PHP render file, no render key in block.json
Post type guard in both block and sidebar panel
All meta fields editable in both block body and sidebar panel
Department taxonomy displayed read-only in block body
photo meta field registered as integer type
template and template_lock added to post type registration
Sidebar panel import added to editor.js

metaFields.name: photo
metaFields.description: Attachment ID for team member photo
metaFields.registrationStatus: TO_ADD — must be registered in theme_register_team_member_meta()

nonMetaFields.name: excerpt
nonMetaFields.label: Role / Job Title
nonMetaFields.description: Used as the role/job title in the card template. Read via getEditedPostAttribute('excerpt'), write via editPost({ excerpt: value })

nonMetaFields.name: department
nonMetaFields.label: Department
nonMetaFields.description: Department taxonomy term. Assigned via the standard WordPress taxonomy panel. Displayed read-only in the block body.
nonMetaFields.editorComponent: Read-only span in body (fetched via useSelect + coreStore). Standard WP taxonomy panel handles assignment.

wrapper.classes: flex flex-col h-full rounded-3xl overflow-hidden bg-accent text-charcoal

fields.note: Photo area at top of card. When no photo is set, show an upload placeholder. The ImageDropUploader should be wrapped in the same p-4 > overflow-hidden rounded-xl structure as the template.

fields.label: Photo
fields.note: Duplicate control in InspectorControls for photo management

fields.classes: inline-block bg-white/80 border border-accent text-charcoal text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider px-2 py-1.5 rounded-full w-fit
fields.note: Fetched via useSelect + coreStore. Display first department term name. Only shown when department is assigned.

Two adjacent RichText components for first_name and last_name, rendered inside a single h3-styled container. Use two RichText fields side by side: first_name (placeholder 'First name...') and last_name (placeholder 'Last name...'). Both with allowedFormats=[] and tagName='span'. The wrapping div gets the text-header-3 class to match the template's h3 styling.
Uses post excerpt, not meta. Read via getEditedPostAttribute('excerpt'), write via editPost({ excerpt: value })

fields.label: Role / Job Title
fields.note: Duplicate in sidebar panel. Uses editPost({ excerpt: value })

indicators.note: Static indicator at bottom of card. Always visible. Includes tertiary arrow SVG icon, same as card-team-member.php. Use the same TertiaryArrow SVG import pattern as TestimonialCPT.

blockWrapper.note: Applied via useBlockProps className. Outer padding for editor comfort.

cardArticle.classes: flex flex-col h-full rounded-3xl overflow-hidden bg-accent text-charcoal max-w-[400px] mx-auto

departmentBadge.classes: inline-block bg-white/80 border border-accent text-charcoal text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider px-2 py-1.5 rounded-full w-fit

responsive.note: CPT block is editor-only. The editor renders at a fixed width inside the block editor canvas. No responsive breakpoints needed for the block itself. The card-team-member.php template handles frontend responsive behavior.

emptyState.photo: Show ImageDropUploader placeholder when no photo is set
emptyState.department: Hide department badge when no department assigned
emptyState.name: Show placeholder text in RichText fields
emptyState.excerpt: Show placeholder text in RichText field

autoTitleSync.note: Keep post title in sync with the name fields. If both are empty, title should be empty string.

editorBehavior.templateLock: Block auto-inserted via template, cannot be removed

elements.note: CPT blocks are editor-only. Accessibility is handled by WordPress block editor infrastructure. No custom ARIA patterns needed.

decisions.decision: Use first_name + last_name as separate meta fields rather than a single name field
decisions.evidence: Post type already registers first_name and last_name as separate meta. Card template constructs full name from both.

decisions.decision: Add photo meta field as integer type for attachment ID
decisions.evidence: card-team-member.php uses get_post_meta(get_the_ID(), 'photo', true) with intval() cast but the field is not yet registered in theme_register_team_member_meta()

decisions.decision: Use post excerpt for role/job title, not a meta field
decisions.evidence: card-team-member.php uses get_the_excerpt() for the role display. Post type already supports 'excerpt'.

decisions.decision: Mirror card-team-member.php HTML structure and Tailwind classes exactly in the editor block body
decisions.evidence: CPT block addendum requires WYSIWYG preview matching frontend template. card-team-member.php provides the exact structure.

decisions.decision: Display name as two adjacent inline RichText fields (first + last) rather than a single combined RichText
decisions.evidence: Meta stores first_name and last_name separately. Template constructs full name via trim(first_name + ' ' + last_name). Two fields allow independent editing while the visual appears as one name.

decisions.decision: Department taxonomy is read-only in block body, edited via standard WP taxonomy panel
decisions.evidence: Following TestimonialCPT pattern where program taxonomy is fetched read-only via useSelect + coreStore

decisions.decision: Get In Touch CTA is a static indicator, not editable
decisions.evidence: card-team-member.php hardcodes 'Get In Touch' text. This is a template-level string, not per-post data.

decisions.decision: Max width 400px centered for editor preview card
decisions.evidence: TestimonialCPT uses max-w-[400px] mx-auto for the card article in the editor. Same pattern applies here for consistent editor experience.

testPage.note: For CPT blocks, the test page is a draft post of the target post type. The developer creates it via taktician_wp_create with resource: 'team_member' and status: 'draft'. The editor URL serves as the test page.

variations.name: test-post
variations.description: A single draft team_member post. The developer should populate it with sample data: first_name, last_name, photo (upload a test image), excerpt (role), and assign a department term.

implementationSteps.description: Register photo meta field: Add 'photo' => ['type' => 'integer', 'default' => 0] to the $meta array in theme_register_team_member_meta() in inc/post-types/team_member.php
Add template and template_lock to team_member post type registration in inc/post-types/team_member.php: 'template' => [['takt/team-member-cpt']], 'template_lock' => 'all'
Create blocks/TeamMemberCPT/block.json following TestimonialCPT pattern with name: takt/team-member-cpt
Create blocks/TeamMemberCPT/TeamMemberCPT.tsx — editor component with visual preview mirroring card-team-member.php. See editorMarkupMap for field-by-field mapping.

Create resources/js/editor/team-member-cpt-panel.tsx — PluginDocumentSettingPanel with all fields: first_name (TextControl), last_name (TextControl), excerpt/role (TextareaControl), photo (MediaUploadPanel)
Create a draft team_member test post via taktician_wp_create
